series_metadata.series_title: Memorandum of Understanding for Campus Counsel
series_metadata.series_description: The Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) for Campus Counsel documents the provision of legal services, including cross-designation of in-house legal counsel for universities and colleges as assistant attorneys general by the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO). Records include, but are not limited to, the AGO MOU with the university or college.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 1 year after MOU superseded or terminated. ; Paper: Retain 1 year after MOU superseded or terminated., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
